nasb.text: “Why are times not stored up by the Almighty, And why do those who know Him not see His days?

esv.text: “Why are not times of judgment kept by the Almighty, and why do those who know him never see his days?

cnv.text: “為甚麼全能者不保留賞善罰惡的時間？ 為甚麼認識他的人不能看見他的日子？

ccb.text: “全能者为何不定下审判的日期？ 为何信靠祂的人要空等一场？
